programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at some of the most terrifying disasters in recent history, from horrifying dramas at sea to one of the worst air disasters in British aviation history, using eye witness testimony and footage taken by those involved telling the human stories behind the events. A cruise ship sailing off the coast of Norway is caught in a dangerous storm, and a passenger witnesses the casing of an airplane engine being ripped off mid-flight

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter Wright takes a trip to a retirement home for sheep, where one of the younger residents has had her good life spoiled by a sore hoof. Julian Norton tries to help a young working dog which has fallen ill after running through a field of barley and may have inhaled some grain into his lungs

programme.title: The Funny Thing About
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas, Anthea Turner, Vanessa Feltz, Carl Fogarty, Nish Kumar and Nina Wadia are joined by a selection of British comedy stars to share their thoughts on the many weird habits, off-putting quirks and wild eccentricities people are willing to put up with while 'in relationships'. Through honest confessionals and witty anecdotes, the assembled talking heads ask how people even know they are officially an item, and celebrate some of the more endearing romantic gestures that come along with the inconveniences of sharing a life with someone else

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Dr Paul Binski, head of art history at Cambridge University, examines icons and artefacts integral to the design of St Sophia's Greek Orthodox Cathedral in London's Regent's Park

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Alistair Appleton visit Scraptoft in Leicester, where a five-bedroom house valued at £229,500 needs a makeover to enhance its appeal. The kitchen is transformed into the hub of family life and a lounge is converted into a dining room, while unfortunate colour clashes are toned down

programme.title: A Day to Remember (1953)
programme.desc: The members of the darts team from the Hand & Flower pub in London head off on a day trip to Boulogne. Among the group is Jim, who is worried that his girlfriend plans to leave him, Shorty, a loner who hopes to join the Foreign Legion, the woman-chasing Charley, and Stan, an entrepreneur who wants to smuggle black-market watches back to the UK. Comedy, starring Stanley Holloway, Donald Sinden and Joan Rice

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Three Billboards Interview Special
programme.desc: Writer-director Martin McDonagh and star Sam Rockwell talk about making the dramatic comedy about revenge and redemption in small-town America

programme.title: Red Mountain (1951)
programme.desc: A Confederate captain sets out to join forces with notorious guerilla militia Quantrill's Raiders, but stops off en route to rescue a man from being lynched for a murder he himself committed - and complicates matters by falling for his fiancee. Western set during the American Civil War, starring Alan Ladd and Lizabeth Scott

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King (1975)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in 19th-century India travel to an unexplored land, where one of them fools the natives into believing he is a god. However, his growing delusions of grandeur put him at loggerheads with his comrade-in-arms. Adventure based on the Rudyard Kipling story, directed by John Huston, starring Sean Connery, Michael Caine, Saeed Jaffrey, Christopher Plummer and Shakira Caine

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes (2017)
programme.desc: Women's tennis champion Billie Jean King takes up the challenge to face former men's champ Bobby Riggs on the court, and disprove his claims that the women's game is an inferior sport. As the match develops into a media circus, both players face problems of their own, as King comes to terms with her sexuality and Riggs battles his gambling addiction. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Emma Stone and Steve Carell

programme.title: Men, Women & Children (2014)
programme.desc: Four teenagers and their parents struggle to deal with the complicated ways in which modern technology has affected their lives and how they communicate. Issues such as celebrity, pornography and eating disorders put all their relationships to the test. Ensemble drama, starring Adam Sandler and Jennifer Garner

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell

programme.title: Apache Uprising (1965)
programme.desc: Western, starring Rory Calhoun as a tough-talking cowboy with a heart of gold who bravely defends fellow stagecoach passengers from a potentially lethal Indian attack. Also starring Corinne Calvet, Lon Chaney Jnr and John Russell

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep (1958)
programme.desc: A commander aboard a US Navy submarine has a titanic clash of egos with his second in command as the senior officer's obsession with sinking as many enemy vessels as possible, whatever the risk, spirals out of control. Second World War drama, starring Clark Gable, Burt Lancaster, Jack Warden, Brad Dexter and Don Rickles

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here (2017)
programme.desc: A former soldier is haunted by memories of abuse and suicidal fantasies, but uses his military skills to rescue abducted girls whose families don't want to involve the authorities. His latest contract is to liberate a senator's teenage daughter, who has been trafficked into a brothel. Lynne Ramsay's psychological thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, with Ekaterina Samsonov and Judith Roberts

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 3 (2015)
programme.desc: Gifted psychic Elise Rainier reluctantly agrees to use her ability to contact the dead in order to help a teenage girl who has been targeted by a dangerous supernatural entity. Horror prequel, starring Dermot Mulroney, Stefanie Scott and Lin Shaye

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum

programme.title: Three Billboards Interview Special
programme.desc: Writer-director Martin McDonagh and star Sam Rockwell talk about making the dramatic comedy about revenge and redemption in small-town America

programme.title: Edward Scissorhands (1990)
programme.desc: A reclusive genius creates a boy but dies before completing him, leaving his brainchild with scissor-like blades in place of hands. A kindly woman from a nearby suburb takes pity on the lonely figure and welcomes him into her home. He quickly becomes a hit in the neighbourhood - but then his new friends start to turn against him. Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb (2014)
programme.desc: Nightwatchman Larry notices that the living exhibits of his museum are behaving strangely. He discovers that the magical artefact that brings them to life is damaged, so he and his friends travel to London's Natural History Museum to find a way to restore it. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Rebel Wilson and Robin Williams in his final film role

programme.title: Gifted (2017)
programme.desc: Single man Frank Adler attempts to raise his child prodigy niece, Mary. However, his plans for a normal school life for the youngster are foiled when the youngster's mathematical abilities come to the attention of Frank's formidable mother, Evelyn. Drama, starring Chris Evans, Lindsay Duncan and Mckenna Grace

programme.title: Three Billboards Interview Special
programme.desc: Writer-director Martin McDonagh and star Sam Rockwell talk about making the dramatic comedy about revenge and redemption in small-town America

programme.title: Atomic Blonde (2017)
programme.desc: MI6 operative Lorraine Broughton is sent to Berlin before the fall of the wall to investigate the murder of a fellow spy and recover a missing list of double agents. The city is in a dangerously unstable state, and she finds herself targetted by multiple factions plotting to exploit the uncertain future for their own ruthless ends. Thriller, starring Charlize Theron, James McAvoy and John Goodman

programme.title: A Cure for Wellness (2016)
programme.desc: An executive is sent to retrieve his company's chief executive officer from a mysterious 'wellness centre' in the Swiss Alps, but suspects the spa's treatments are not what they seem. Psychological thriller, starring Dane DeHaan, Mia Goth and Jason Isaacs

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway (2018)
programme.desc: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton are sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more terrifying. Horror, starring Lalor Roddy, Ciaran Flynn and Helena Bereen

programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordon's disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express his pride in his daughter. Barry takes up the role of school sports mascot, but fails to realise that students from a rival school are planning to beat up the mascot at an upcoming game

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big Risky Business-inspired party at Lainey's house while her father is out of town. However, when the gathering gets out of control, Beverly has to come to their rescue. Elsewhere, Adam annoys Murray by talking to Dana on the phone for hours on end

programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

Starring Frankie Muniz and Erik Per Sullivan

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old virgin Josh hopes to find a fairy-tale princess to remove his innocence, while twentysomething Manchester couple Matt and Mary are interested in exploring the possibilities of polyamory and finding a third person to join their relationship. However, with two people doing the picking, will they ever be able to agree on who to date?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their views of Louis Theroux's Altered States: Love Without Limits, Sheridan Smith: Coming Home, The Secret Life of the Zoo, The Chase, The Haunting of Hill House and Killing Eve. From November 2018

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Dean Gaffney heads out in search of his ideal woman, someone who can be both naughty and nice. After a successful first date in the rather rustic surroundings of a shed, Liv Bentley wants to take Dom out somewhere a little more luxurious. Meanwhile, the agents want to test if Amy Childs' feelings for Jamie are lust or potential love, so they send her on a date with new man Jake. Plus, Alison Hammond catches up with old friend Kate Lawler to talk sex and celibacy

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Hippie mum Angeline Walker lives on a bus with her husband and eight kids. She swaps lives with wealthy Tenille Duncan, who has six children and lives in a mansion

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon helps Leonard drop off a parcel for Penny, but when he sees how messy her flat is, he tries to do a good deed - which is not well received. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When Andre Jr is accepted by both Howard and Stanford universities, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The family is divided over the idea of getting a dog after Dre and Rainbow promise Jack he can have one if he achieves straight As at school. Rainbow's brother Johan is back in town but he doesn't get the warm welcome he was expecting from Ruby

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost comes to the rescue of Upstate New York couple Ian and Jamie Orr, whose children's problems range from picky eating to playing violent video games that lead to nightmares

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The participants return for one final gathering to discuss their time in the experiment and gain closure around any outstanding issues

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: New charter guests come aboard to celebrate their seven-month dating anniversary, and the crew must provide the romantic trip of their lives

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Hannah experiences the ultimate betrayal when Ben goes to the Captain about their miscommunication. Bryan decides to give Danny a lesson in deckie etiquette

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. However, to prove his findings he must first win the trust of fellow scientist Barry Kripke to gain access to a powerful computer. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and John Ross Bowie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny runs into money troubles, so Sheldon offers to lend her some cash to help her pay the rent. However, when Leonard discovers his neighbour's ex-boyfriend Kurt is the cause of her financial woes, he gathers the gang for a confrontation. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny share an intimate moment as they recover from a psychological deconstruction by the physicist's mother, an expert in psychiatry and neural sciences. Guest starring Mamma Mia! actress Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions between Sheldon and Penny reach a new high after a paintballing accident leaves an ugly stain on the awkward physicist's favourite sofa cushion. Meanwhile, romance blossoms between Leslie and Howard. Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny ask Howard and Bernadette for advice when they argue about money. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj try to find out whether they could survive a dark matter research expedition in a salt mine by attempting to simulate the conditions in a steam tunnel beneath the university. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle (2016)
programme.desc: Biopic of British sporting underdog Eddie Edwards. Determined to fulfil his dreams of becoming an Olympic athlete, Edwards trains as a ski jumper - a field in which Britain had no other competitors. He secures a place in the 1988 Winter Olympics, where his can-do attitude makes him a media sensation in the face of a losing streak. Starring Taron Egerton, Hugh Jackman and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on This Morning, Earth's Magical Kingdom, and Ant and Dec's Saturday Night Takeaway. They also cat their eyes over The Mandalorian, The Repair Shop and The Nest. Plus, reflections on the coronavirus, including Prime Minister Boris Johnson's statement. First shown in March 2020

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes under review include James May: Oh Cook, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, Naked Attraction, and news coverage of Dominic Cummings and Donald Trump

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: In an edition first shown in November 2018, the sofa critics review The Heist, Strictly Come Dancing, Dynasties, They Shall Not Grow Old, Extreme Everest with Ant Middleton, First Dates, and What Lies Beneath

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and haven't given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fairy-tale fan Kathleen still hasn't met her Prince Charming, but at first glance, international fashion model Sam doesn't disappoint. Historical re-enactor Rory meets Aussie cross-stitcher Maddie, and woos her with his knowledge of Viking beards, while animal lover Steph is paired with fireman Rich. Will she be impressed with his stories of saving cats from burning buildings?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Tynemouth 61 in Tyne and Wear, where owner Stephen Minns taking his guests to an indoor climbing wall in his attempt to impress them

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants visit the Black Horse Inn in Kirkby Fleetham, North Yorkshire, where manager Steve Barker and bar manager Callum Dixon believe they can win their guests over

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week the group head to The Shores Hotel in Blackpool, where guests Lottie and Lil are surprised by the view from their window

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lottie and Lil Ellis try to convince the contestants that glamping is glamorous at Hilltop Hideaways in Royal Leamington Spa - only for one guest to reveal she will not be staying

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Tynemouth 61 is first and host Stephen Minns wants Enid and Nathanael to dish the dirt on their comments about cleanliness

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Simon O'Brien are in Woking, where they find a sidecar to be transformed into a boat and a water cylinder that Simon might make a trendy lamp

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Tortoises Burt and Terrance become rivals in love when they pursue a breeding female. Meanwhile, six-year-old okapi K'Tusha nears the end of her first pregnancy, and keepers hope that her baby will help to conserve this highly-endangered species, and Asian elephant bull Aung-Bo senses that the three-day window for mating is about to begin

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. Dick also converts a stone barn into a flat for Angel's parents, getting rid of 150 years' worth of rubbish in the process, but tensions rise between the couple when he gets carried away with the trees at the front of the property

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows interior designer Kathryn Tyler as she tries to create a Scandinavian-style eco house in her mother's back garden in Falmouth, Cornwall, close by the Lizard Peninsula. The plan is ambitious, featuring a white-painted brick ground floor, a lightweight timber-frame first floor and cleverly designed spaces, but the small size of the plot and Kathryn's inexperience could hamper the project

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Greg and Helen Watson have bought a home in one of the most expensive areas of Sheffield, South Yorkshire, but it's too cramped for their needs and needs renovating. What's more, their third child is due in 18 weeks and they are desperate to move in before then. Architects Howard Evans and Prue Chiles are given the job, but with the Covid-19 lockdown, the wettest month on record and some major design differences, the build is in danger of collapsing before their £120,000 budget runs out

programme.title: The Tudors
programme.desc: Catherine of Aragon's nephew Charles V visits King Henry, while the royal also comes face to face with Anne Boleyn for the first time. Cardinal Wolsey meets envoys from the Holy Roman Empire to discuss a treaty between the two powers. However, tensions mount when the King of France hears news of their plans

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts another round of light-hearted words-and-numbers fun, with Sean Lock and Katherine Ryan taking on Jon Richardson and David Mitchell. Nick Helm is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley does the adding up

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: An inmate comes in with an entirely preventable illness, so Max, Sharpe and Iggy head directly to the source - Rikers Island. Bloom struggles with her recovery and Reynolds gets news that could change his life

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits a green bean plantation in Kenya to find out how they grow the beans so straight for the supermarkets, and finds out what happens to those that don't make the grade. At a Norwegian scallop farm, Matt Tebbutt braves the icy waters of the North Sea to join the divers harvesting scallops by hand from the seabed, and Kate Quilton tries to unravel a mystery about Cornwall's most famous local delicacy

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits Manhattan, where she creates candy canes and lollipops at artisan sugar crafter Papabubble, before heading back to the UK to learn how to make passion fruit marshmallows covered in chocolate and coconut

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Salsa-loving couple Colin and Joy cannot wait to buy a holiday home on the popular Costa Blanca. However, the pressure is really on for Ben Hillman to get it right, as it's the first time the couple have brought a property together. For their budget of £200,000, can Ben Hillman deliver the perfect property in the perfect location and do they make an offer?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog a huge range of possessions they unearth in Britain's barns and garages, to make money for their owners. In this episode, they celebrate Henry's birthday with some serious finds in Wensleydale in Yorkshire

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Test Cricket Highlights

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: General manager Garry Healey and housekeeper Zara Doherty welcome their rivals to the Cliffemount Hotel in Runswick Bay in North Yorkshire. Guests Lana and Alistair are wowed by the views, but Belgian sisters Daniele and Chantal don't think the décor reflects their surroundings. After an afternoon fossil hunting on the beach, Garry entertains his guests at dinner with a taste of his past, and gives them a sight to remember. In the morning, Claire and Adam think their breakfast lacks flavour, and the feedback leaves Garry and Zara wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Hospitality newcomers Alistair Arundel and Lana Keptanare welcome their rivals to the Quayside Hotel in Boston in Lincolnshire. Most of the guests are bowled over by the bling, but Claire feels like she's stuck in a neon nightmare. Feathers are ruffled during an afternoon of parrot-handling, with Garry and Zara feeling that Claire and Adam have shown their true colours. At dinner, the guests are impressed by Alistair and Lana's renovation story, but Alistair takes a dim view of Claire's LED criticism

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire Lennon and Adam De Marco welcome their rivals to Hollington Park Glamping near Newbury, Berkshire. Sisters Daniele and Chantal are happy glampers but the other guests are shocked by the communal composting toilet. After an arty afternoon, Garry and Zara put aside their differences with their hosts. At dinner, Lana and Alistair don't hold back their feelings about camping, and at breakfast they reveal the full horror of their night under the stars. The feedback reveals that sharing isn't caring when it comes to the communal composting loo, and Claire and Adam have to face the fact that glamping isn't to everyone's taste

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sisters Daniele Spiers and Chantal Wirth welcome their rivals to Swan House in Kelvedon in Essex. The traditional decor impresses the guests, but there's cleanliness criticism all round, and Lana has wardrobe woes. During an afternoon of wine tasting, Claire and Adam reveal that their feedback hasn't left a bad taste in the mouth, and over dinner the group finds out more about Daniele's romantic past. In the morning, Garry and Zara wake up on the wrong side of bed after a disturbed night's sleep

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The Cliffemount Hotel is first to host and Garry and Zara want to get to grips with Claire and Adam's breakfast grumbles

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Herefordshire to meet former farmer Julian. Henry finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, while Simon hatches plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's the festive season at Chester Zoo and the keepers are making sure everyone gets a gift, from the meerkats to the miniature monkeys. Christmas comes early with the birth of sun bear cub Kyra, but the new arrival proves a little over-adventurous and gets stuck up a tree. There's a yuletide ceasefire in the long turf war between the otters and the babirusas, the vets have terrible news about golden-headed tamarind Pru, and plucky spider Winston attempts to snag man-eater Ruby

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: As summer arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree are busier than ever with seven weddings and 14 food lovers' weekends to prepare for. As if that wasn't enough to keep them busy, they must also sort out the garden, work on a stables conversion and embark on a surprising floating adventure

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's the quarter-final, and the remaining potters face a challenge inspired by Native American Acoma pottery that involves firing their pots in cow dung. Judges Rich Miller and Keith Brymer Jones set a tricky second challenge to throw an Alabama ring bottle in this all-American week, but who will secure an all-important place in the semi-final? Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Deutschland 89
programme.desc: November 1989 sees political unrest and the HVA short-staffed. Fritz approaches East German spy Martin Rauch for a 'simple' courier job - stop further liberal reforms from being passed by the GDR government and carry out a political assassination if necessary. Martin doesn't want to touch this job, but his son Max's future is at risk so he agrees. Once he's in position, he goes rogue and his mission snowballs, culminating in East Germans flooding over the border into West Berlin. Meanwhile, his aunt Lenora has become radicalized in prison and is very angry about the sudden events taking place in her beloved state, and Fritz infiltrates a group who hope to turn East Germany into a socialist Utopia. Drama sequel, starring Jonas Nay, Maria Schrader and Sylvester Groth. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. He's very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patient's wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to A&E by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get John's pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland

programme.title: The Great British Dig: History in Your Back Garden
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and the team of expert archaeologists unearth William the Conqueror's lost Priory hidden beneath the neighbourhood lawns of Lenton in Nottingham

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The team at St George's treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors can't guarantee he won't lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into A&E by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her family's garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The team treats two trauma patients arriving by helicopter on the hospital's new helipad. Eric, 75, collapsed shortly after falling from a ladder while pruning trees in his garden. He is stabilised and put in an induced coma while a CT scan is used to determine any internal injuries. IT consultant Mihhail, 29, is admitted after crashing his motorbike at high speed and again a CT scan is employed to look for hidden wounds. He's later transferred to the Intensive Care Unit while specialists decide how to repair the damage to his liver and stop his internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 22-year-old performing arts student Maria complains of chest pains and 82-year-old Rusty is treated for a broken ankle sustained in a road accident

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Henning Wehn compete against Jon Richardson and Victoria Coren Mitchell. Tom Allen joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters with 'help' from Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The team at St George's treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors can't guarantee he won't lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into A&E by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her family's garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury

programme.desc: The trio travel to Italy to test high-performance hatchbacks. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and Richard Hammond find second-hand bargains for the same price as the £6,995 Nissan Pixo. James May is in Nevada to test the toughness of the Range Rover Evoque, driving it through Death Valley before chauffeuring a megastar across Las Vegas. Plus, the McLaren MP4-12C is compared with its supercar rival the Ferrari 458 Italia, and four-time Formula One world champion Sebastian Vettel is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of the Ferrari F12 Berlinetta, sampling the punch of its 730bhp V12 engine on the open roads of Scotland. Richard Hammond harnesses the power of motorsport on a quest to find the world's best taxi, and James May pays tribute to the former BBC Television Centre in White City, London, using a motorcyclist and a pair of parkour runners. Plus, the BAC Mono - an astonishingly fast car with just one seat - is put through its paces on the test track, and film director Ron Howard goes for a spin in the new Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy get a family pet in an attempt to teach the children to be more responsible. But as ever, things do not quite work out as planned. Domestic comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton, with a guest appearance from former EastEnders actress Annette Badland (Aunt Babe)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star in the domestic comedy which sees the couple appear to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucy's disapproving parents, Lee's feckless dad Frank and their world-weary friends Toby and Anna. programme.title: The Man Who Killed Richard III
programme.desc: Documentary about the king's death at the Battle of Bosworth, exploring the conspiracy and intrigue behind the conflict and attempting to identify who killed Richard

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis
programme.desc: The historian reveals a story of invasion in Britain spanning millennia, beginning with him felling a tree with a flint axe in Kent, and riding an Iron Age chariot. Sam Willis also searches for clues of invasion at Silbury Hill, and tracks down evidence of the Beaker people, who brought ceramics, metalwork and beakers to Britain

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: The team acquire a personalised Victorian pistol and try to track down the original owner. A customer brings in brasses that his dad brought back from the Somme

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Château de Fontainebleau in France, which began life as a medieval castle in the 12th century before being turned into a renaissance palace in the 1500s

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: A visit to Peles Castle in Romania, which was built in a medieval style in 1914 but is filled with modern technological innovations, including its own hydro-electric power plant

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the next stage of his journey to Wolverhampton, Michael Portillo visits Lacock Abbey near Chippenham in Wiltshire to find out how the world's first photographic negative was made. He then heads to Bristol Zoo, examines an extraordinary piece of Victorian engineering at Severn Tunnel Junction and ends the leg in Gloucester, where he meets a stonemason at the city's cathedral

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his journey from Southampton to the West Midlands, Michael Portillo visits the spa town of Cheltenham, where he gets behind the wheel of a very early locomotive carriage that ran on the road. In Tewkesbury, he joins a group re-enacting a battle from the Wars of the Roses, before he reaches his final destination of Wolverhampton, where he hears how Queen Victoria made an emotional visit that signalled the end of her exile from public life after mourning Prince Albert

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Bowood House, Wiltshire, and hears the story of a man who went in search of his biological father after finding letters to his mother from an American soldier. The experts examine a box engraved with a secret code, a cigarette case made by a Russian craftsman, a collection of transistor radios and a cartoon based on a news story about an escaped lion that hid in a school

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: Since their meteoric rise in the 19th Century, railways have been at the forefront of modern engineering. They've conquered dizzying altitudes, wilderness, seas and cities.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Examining a ghost island once belonging to a secretive country on the fringes of Europe. Also, a haunting site in the UK with evidence of strange burial practices

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Exploring UFO sightings over Canada and the US during both World Wars and theories that Churchill knew about the attack on Pearl Harbor before it happened

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: An account of Hitler's decision to invade the Soviet Union, which produced an initial series of dazzling victories until the harsh winter of 1941 took hold, with fatal consequences for the ill-equipped German army. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two programmes from Bowood House, Wiltshire, and hears the story of a man who went in search of his biological father after finding letters to his mother from an American soldier. The experts examine a box engraved with a secret code, a cigarette case made by a Russian craftsman, a collection of transistor radios and a cartoon based on a news story about an escaped lion that hid in a school

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a journey to Chichester, with the first leg beginning in Norwich. At the city's Norman castle he uncovers the Victorian public's gory fascination with crime and punishment and finds out how campaigners such as Elizabeth Fry worked to improve conditions for prisoners. Heading west to Thetford, he explores how the Victorian appetite for rabbits and their fur led to special train services to London, and ends in the Suffolk town of Brandon, where he tries his hand at flint-knapping

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Ipswich to Chelmsford, starting at an agricultural implements works with its own railway sidings. Continuing his journey south-west into Essex, Michael dredges for oysters off Mersea Island before taking the train to Witham, where he discovers a model farming establishment at Tiptree. His final destination is Chelmsford, home to the world's first purpose-built radio equipment factory, established by Guglielmo Marconi

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton-le-Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How the myth of German invincibility was finally debunked by their defeat at the Battle of Stalingrad. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: World War Two From Above
programme.desc: Experts uncover a WWII German trench system revealing a daring commando raid to capture it. And, the sunken remains of a tank show how dangerous preparations for D-Day were

programme.title: Secrets of Britain
programme.desc: Exploring the history of Westminster Abbey, which dates back to the 11th century and houses more than 500 corpses, including those of Edward I, Elizabeth I, Charles Darwin and Isaac Newton, as well as staging 16 royal weddings. The episode also explores the Houses of Parliament and Big Ben

programme.title: Invasion! With Sam Willis

programme.title: History Hunters

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look through the corridors of power in 10 of the most opulent and historic royal residences on Earth

programme.title: World's Greatest Palaces

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a journey to Chichester, with the first leg beginning in Norwich. At the city's Norman castle he uncovers the Victorian public's gory fascination with crime and punishment and finds out how campaigners such as Elizabeth Fry worked to improve conditions for prisoners. Heading west to Thetford, he explores how the Victorian appetite for rabbits and their fur led to special train services to London, and ends in the Suffolk town of Brandon, where he tries his hand at flint-knapping

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an episode focused on Indian art and culture from the Neasden Temple in North London, revealing the connections between British and Indian history. Among the artefacts being valued are ceremonial robes used in the Delhi Durbar, a ring given to a boy by a princess, a Rolls Royce made for the Maharajah of Jodhpur and a bracelet found in a children's toy box that turns out to have a surprising background

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo tunes into the music of the mills and collieries of Victorian England by joining a brass band in Honley, West Yorkshire, before stopping off in Holmfirth to learn about a tragedy that led to a tourist boom in the town. The presenter then crosses into Derbyshire to pay homage to railway engineer George Stephenson at his resting place in Chesterfield, before concluding his journey at Chatsworth House, which was one of the first stately homes to welcome visitors by rail

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey to Leeds, beginning at London's Euston station. He finds out what happened to the once proud Euston Arch and heads to Camden to see how goods were transported by rail, road and canal. He reflects on the Harrow rail disaster of 1952 and visits a country estate in Tring, Hertfordshire, before alighting at Cheddington in Buckinghamshire, which is close to the scene of 1963's Great Train Robbery

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey to Leeds by travelling through Buckinghamshire, meeting one of the Second World War's most secret agents at Bletchley. In Olney, he learns about a poet whose words are still sung today, and explores the first purpose-built railway town at Wolverton. His last stop is Newport Pagnell, where he tackles the ancient craft of vellum-making

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The next part of Michael Portillo's journey from London to Leeds begins in Northampton, where Victorian methods have been used to make shoes for more than 130 years. The ex-politician then heads to Warwickshire, learning about the legacy of Dr Thomas Arnold at Rugby School and finding out how Coventry's craftsmen learned to adapt to survive, before ending this leg of his trip in Nuneaton

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the next stage of his journey to Leeds, Michael Portillo sets off in Leicester, where he finds out about the hunt for Richard III's remains. Michael works his passage on the Great Central Railway from Rothley to Loughborough, where he learns about a family that has been casting bells in the town since 1839

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his journey, Michael Portillo rediscovers a once-famous poet in Nottingham and travels on a railway line resurrected by popular demand after falling victim to Beeching's cuts. He finds out how Doncaster rail workers shaped British political history, before reaching his final destination of Leeds, where he auditions at Britain's oldest continuously working music hall

programme.title: David Bowie: Finding Fame
programme.desc: The final part of Francis Whately's trilogy of films on Bowie's life, telling the story of the five years when many of the ideas that would help him become an icon were first born. programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Shaira, who used to attend a private Swiss school and is used to expensive holidays, goes to stay with Tara, Paul and their two children in Northampton

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Midlands-based pest exterminators Chris and Mark take on some elusive mice causing havoc in an unexpected location, while in Buckinghamshire, a lorry load of potentially hazardous waste is dumped by the side of a main road, and boss David suspects it could be linked to organised crime

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Landlady Rose gets a shock when she finally gains access to her property, and Dave from Peterborough Council's housing team comes across some of the worst damp and mould he has ever seen. Plus, Selina and Lee must return from America for a court case to recover £10,000 rent arrears on their UK property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stick of dynamite causes chaos for Duggie when it is brought into Carlisle's main police station and the armed response unit is called out after there is a report of a gun being spotted in a city centre bar. Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows, officers haul in a driver who is well over the limit and Hayley comes to the rescue when a teenager's car hits a wall during a late-night drive. Documentary following the work of Cumbria's Roads Policing Unit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ross and John put their armed-response training to the test when they tackle a suspected gunman, while teams are called out to deal with the results of dangerous driving after a person parks on a roundabout and a pedestrian is crushed under a car. Elsewhere, officers raid a cannabis farm, a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell, and Phil finds out what happens when the driver of a Subaru Impreza decides to take on an HGV

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Duggie and Mark show that they are as quick on their feet as they are behind the wheel when a serial offender tries to give them the runaround. A high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, PC Dan Myerscough loses patience with a silver-tongued drunk, and officers Martin and Hayley are called out to a 4x4 that has come a cropper due to treacherous ice

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve try to recover almost £2,000 owed by the owner of a bridal shop in London, while officers Gary and Cona in Kent chase over £4,000 of vet fees after two neighbouring dogs got into a fight. In south west London, agents try to collect almost £11,500 owed by a small business

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Hendrix, jealous and angry with Brent, confronts Harlow about him. Despite Aaron, Jane and David's best attempts, it is Harlow who convinces Brent to return to school

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Kieran is furious and begins to manipulate his loved ones. Ari interrogates Mia regarding why she lied to Chloe about him. Ziggy and Tane's flirting pays off

programme.title: Cats and Dogs at War
programme.desc: Documentary following families with warring pets, including terrier-cross pup Teddy who is tormenting his feline housemates Ernie and Molly

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Catching up with former dancer and onsite sales supremo Bambi, who is working harder than ever in her role as part of the caravan sales team. She welcomes British couple Alan and Caroline to their new static home, and also gives viewers a peek inside her own luxury caravan. What her neighbours don't know is that plans for a new caravan park are afoot, and Bambi's bosses have asked her to relocate. Narrated by John Thomson

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary examining the case against Luke Mitchell, who was accused of brutally murdering 14-year-old schoolgirl Jodi Jones in 2003. 17 years on from her murder, two former detectives who are now private investigators re-open the case files and re-examine the police and prosecution's case against Luke Mitchell, who continues to maintain his innocence to this day. Throughout the programme, the investigators uncover shocking details of other male DNA found at the crime scene, and disturbing new information from a witness living in the area at the time

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: The re-examination of the case against Luke Mitchell unearths shocking revelations about two males who were identified by eyewitnesses at the scene where Jodi was murdered. The conduct of the police while interviewing Mitchell as a 14-year-old is called into question, and Luke and his mother Corinne take a lie-detector test

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bank at Quantico is robbed and a security guard killed, but the team soon discovers that stealing money may not have been the perpetrators' primary objective. Meanwhile, Gibbs is given the task of evaluating an inexperienced new agent assigned by Vance to help investigate the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rey Valentin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs sends DiNozzo and Ziva to retrieve top-secret information from a secure military base - a mission aimed at catching a mole in the NCIS ranks. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that the traitor is still at large - so the building is locked down and all agents are rounded up in a final effort to catch the culprit. Guest starring Jude Ciccolella

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Police action to close down an illegal dog-fighting ring leads to a murder inquiry when officers find a woman's finger inside one of the creatures. As the case deepens, Detectives Green and Lupo must contend with the involvement of a pushy journalist. Crime drama, guest starring Lara Flynn Boyle (The Practice)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A routine investigation brings to light evidence that prompts Briscoe and Logan to pick up the trail of a political fugitive who went underground following a 1971 burglary that left a police officer dead. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lt Van Buren is mugged by two teenagers, but the hold-up does not go according to plan and the officer discharges her weapon, killing one of the youngsters with a shot to the back. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a man is crushed to death under a crane. Initially they suspect the construction company of foul play, but the case leads them to the victim's hospitalised wife, as well as plans for a controversial medical procedure

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of a man visiting New York City to confront his past, but as they delve into the victim's personal life, the case becomes complicated when all clues point to a revered sheriff. Meanwhile, McCoy faces competition when a new district attorney is nominated for election

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. However, they find themselves unable to arrest him due to confidentiality rules, and his patients' reluctance to talk

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Having identified the mole in their ranks, the agents arrest the traitor's contact Ted Bankston, a former NSA agent working for a kidnapper code-named the Weatherman - who is making millions on the stock markets out of stolen military data. Drama, with Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed in what initially seems to be a road-rage incident - until investigations reveal evidence of foul play. Digging deeper, the team finds the dead man belonged to an underground fight club, and sets about discovering whether his involvement was a factor in the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, the team works overtime to solve a robbery - a case made doubly difficult by the fact that the prime suspect is a former petty officer who has supposedly been dead for 17 years. Eventually arrested at a Vietnam memorial, he manages to convince Gibbs of his innocence - but a discovery in the forensics lab suggests he may be guilty after all. Guest starring Peter Coyote

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU searches for two suspects spotted fleeing the scene after a Muslim woman is assaulted inside a synagogue. Meanwhile, Benson is dismayed to find Rob Miller out on bail. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A corrections officer is arrested, accused of sexually assaulting his female charges both inside the prison system and beyond. As the case against the man begins to take shape, the union that supports him takes aim at Barba and the other members of the unit. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As the investigation of Gary Munson goes on, his union takes action and threatens the lives in the SVU

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank search for a murderer who is killing military veterans from a platoon that was involved in horrific war crimes

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Part one of two. A Wesen goes on a killing spree, but only preys on worthy opponents that it will be a challenge to fight

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green comes under investigation by Internal Affairs after he shoots a suspect, and the case reveals a host of secrets the detective would rather keep hidden, threatening not only his police career but his freedom. Jesse L Martin stars, alongside S Epatha Merkerson and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A logbook is Logan's only lead when Arthur Kopinsky is found dead at his law firm. A closer look at the evidence suggests suspects in the form of a swindler who stole a woman's fortune, and the son of his target, who was once wealthy himself. Starring Chris Noth and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man who served as a juror in the trial of a mobster is shot dead at a baseball game, leading to a battle of wills between McCoy and his long-time friend - the suspect's attorney. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of memoir writer Sweetie Ness. Clues initially lead them to suspect his stalker, agent and a groupie, but after digging deeper into the victim's past, they begin to consider the possibility he was not who he claimed to be

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's murder leads Lupo and Bernard to learn she was secretly in conflict with her husband, going against his desire that their family lead an environmentally friendly life. The case is complicated further when a dead passenger and drugs turn up in the car she was using, with the complexity continuing in the courtroom as Cutter suspects someone has been tampering with evidence. Guest starring Ned Beatty (Deliverance) and Sherry Stringfield (ER)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a board-member at an exclusive private school, and a man's ambitions for his offspring are stretched to the limit when he admits to the crime, despite the fact his son was the gunman. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A dramatic undercover operation results in the death of a serial killer, seemingly bringing the case to an abrupt conclusion. However, it gradually becomes clear that he may have worked with an accomplice - and evidence emerges to implicate the new man in Ziva's life. Drama, starring Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Assistant coroner Palmer is called to the building site on a Navy base where a body has been found. While looking into the incident, he spots an armed man fleeing the scene with the victim's passport and is almost killed as he gives chase. It appears the document was stolen to hinder the investigation, but the discovery of a second corpse reveals a case of stolen identity and a compensation racket

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part story, the entire team is put in danger while hunting for the killer of a former NCIS agent. Jenny Shepard calls in Mike Franks for help, afraid she too is a target - and convinced Gibbs will be next. American crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A young boy is found wandering alone in Central Park and the search for his parents leads to startling evidence of a planned mass casualty event in the city. As the SVU works with the joint-terrorism task force to find the suspects and the motive, Benson has to convince Barba to address allegations of rape and torture the boy's mother discloses

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man convicted of rape is exonerated and released 16 years later. However, on the night of his release, the daughter of the woman he was convicted of raping is also raped and murdered - and he is SVU's prime suspect. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man uses a fake identity to lure a woman into bed, destroying her family, so Barba tries to get him convicted of rape - only to face a sceptical legal team. Raul Esparza stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins leads a sting operation to take down child pornographer Teddy Hawkins, also well-known as the owner of a chain of successful restaurants. However, when the team examines Teddy's cyber credentials, they discover he is connected to Deputy Commissioner Abraham, who vehemently denies any involvement in Hawkins' illicit distribution ring. With two high-profile arrests to their name, Rollins and her colleagues must work quickly to justify their actions before Abraham uses his power to make the charges 'go away'. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape charge Barba is bringing against a popular actor is placed in jeopardy, prompting Rollins to step in and take matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Juliette regains the last of her memories and wants to get back together with Nick, whose latest case uncovers a plot to create an army of zombies. Adalind makes a dangerous bargain with Stefania to regain her supernatural powers - in exchange for her unborn child

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Juliette's romantic reunion is cut short by a horde of zombies Renard and Baron Samedi have unleashed, while Frau Pech casts a spell on Adalind

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pays a social call on her friend, an American expatriate living in Ireland, but it is not long before her uncanny nose for trouble leads her to a corpse concealed in an old ruin. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murder of a crooked deputy, and she soon has not one but three suspects - the owner of an illegal casino, her own accountant and his daughter's jilted lover. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury, Ron Masak and William Windom

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A chain-store owner claims his business has dwindled because of his trial and acquittal for the murder of his wife - and he blames Jessica, who has mentioned him in one of her books. Angela Lansbury stars, with guest appearances by George Segal, Morgan Fairchild and Julianna Margulies

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits London to help with a stage adaptation of one of her novels - but the show's producer meets a grisly fate, and the leading actress is accused of murder. Whodunit, guest starring Jean Marsh and Ian Ogilvy, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
